title: Bridge Essay: Review of the Neural Oscillations Underlying Meditation.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Formless/Absorption** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Formless absorption — meditative absorption, samadhi, jhana, trance states, transcendental meditation, non-ordinary states of consciousness.

**Review of the Neural Oscillations Underlying Meditation.** — Front Neurosci. PMID: 29662434. DOI: 10.3389/fnins.2018.00178. Objective: Meditation is one type of mental training that has been shown to produce many cognitive benefits. Meditation practice is associated with improvement in concentration and reduction of stress, depression, and anxiety symptoms. Furthermore, different forms of meditation training are now being used as interventions for avariety of psychological and somatic illnesses. These benefits are thought to occur as aresult of neurophysiologic changes. The most commonly studied specific meditation...
